name: Court Bouillon for Poaching Fish
recipeIngredient: 1 stalk celery, peeled and sliced (half-inch thick)
1/2 cup white vinegar or 1 1/2 cups dry white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Lower the heat and simmer uncovered for 20-30 minutes.
3. Strain and reserve the liquid.
4. The court bouillon can be refrigerated for up to 3 days or frozen for months.
